about.headline: I turn messy problems into clear, useful insights.
about.bio1: I enjoy working with data, asking the right questions, and finding patterns that help in making better decisions.
about.bio2: From writing user stories to building dashboards, I like being in the space where business meets product.
about.bio3: I'm currently deep-diving into Business Analysis, product management, and stakeholder communication.
about.quote: Good decisions come from clarity, and clarity comes from questions.
